message:
Running command: PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
DESIGN_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

# Create verification directory and stage scenarios
mkdir -p "$DESIGN_ROOT/verification/scenarios"

# Copy all 21 scenario files
cp "$PROJECT_ROOT/verification/scenarios/"*.yaml "$DESIGN_ROOT/verification/scenarios/"
echo "Scenario files staged: $(ls $DESIGN_ROOT/verification/scenarios/ | wc -l)"

# Write verification/manifest.yaml
python3 -c "
import yaml, shutil
from pathlib import Path

manifest_src = Path('$PROJECT_ROOT/docs/dv/scenario_manifest.yaml')
manifest_dst = Path('$DESIGN_ROOT/verification/manifest.yaml')

# Load source manifest
src = yaml.safe_load(manifest_src.read_text())

# Rewrite file paths to be relative to design_root
scenarios = src['scenarios']
for s in scenarios:
    orig = s['file']  # e.g. verification/scenarios/scenario_foo.yaml
    # Repoint to within design_root
    fname = Path(orig).name
    s['file'] = f'verification/scenarios/{fname}'

# Build final manifest
out_manifest = {
    'schema': 'nc_verification_manifest/v1',
    'design': src['metadata']['design'],
    'design_alias': src['metadata']['design_alias'],
    'generated_by': 'nc_chipgen mcu_factory_generation',
    'stage': 'stage_2',
    'scenario_count': src['metadata']['total_scenarios'],
    'checklist_items': src['metadata']['total_checklist_items'],
    'coverage_gaps': src['metadata']['coverage_gaps'],
    'scenarios': scenarios,
    'coverage_map': src['coverage_map'],
    'metadata': src['metadata'],
}

manifest_dst.write_text(
    '# Verification Manifest — mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu\n'
    '# Generated by nc_chipgen MCU Factory Generation\n'
    '# Stage 2: All 21 scenario files staged to verification/scenarios/\n\n'
    + yaml.safe_dump(out_manifest, sort_keys=False, default_flow_style=False)
)
print(f'verification/manifest.yaml written: {manifest_dst}')
print(f'Scenario count in manifest: {len(scenarios)}')
"

args.command:
PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
DESIGN_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

# Create verification directory and stage scenarios
mkdir -p "$DESIGN_ROOT/verification/scenarios"

# Copy all 21 scenario files
cp "$PROJECT_ROOT/verification/scenarios/"*.yaml "$DESIGN_ROOT/verification/scenarios/"
echo "Scenario files staged: $(ls $DESIGN_ROOT/verification/scenarios/ | wc -l)"

# Write verification/manifest.yaml
python3 -c "
import yaml, shutil
from pathlib import Path

manifest_src = Path('$PROJECT_ROOT/docs/dv/scenario_manifest.yaml')
manifest_dst = Path('$DESIGN_ROOT/verification/manifest.yaml')

# Load source manifest
src = yaml.safe_load(manifest_src.read_text())

# Rewrite file paths to be relative to design_root
scenarios = src['scenarios']
for s in scenarios:
    orig = s['file']  # e.g. verification/scenarios/scenario_foo.yaml
    # Repoint to within design_root
    fname = Path(orig).name
    s['file'] = f'verification/scenarios/{fname}'

# Build final manifest
out_manifest = {
    'schema': 'nc_verification_manifest/v1',
    'design': src['metadata']['design'],
    'design_alias': src['metadata']['design_alias'],
    'generated_by': 'nc_chipgen mcu_factory_generation',
    'stage': 'stage_2',
    'scenario_count': src['metadata']['total_scenarios'],
    'checklist_items': src['metadata']['total_checklist_items'],
    'coverage_gaps': src['metadata']['coverage_gaps'],
    'scenarios': scenarios,
    'coverage_map': src['coverage_map'],
    'metadata': src['metadata'],

manifest_dst.write_text(
    '# Verification Manifest — mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu\n'

    '# Stage 2: All 21 scenario files staged to verification/scenarios/\n\n'
    + yaml.safe_dump(out_manifest, sort_keys=False, default_flow_style=False)
)
print(f'verification/manifest.yaml written: {manifest_dst}')
print(f'Scenario count in manifest: {len(scenarios)}')
"
